metadata.description: Subnet index used for hub services (only applies to hub VNet)
Controls whether subnets should be created/modified

input.regionKey: [if(variables('isSingleRegion'), variables('regionKeys')[0], if(and(equals(variables('vmList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')].type, 'dc'), equals(variables('vmList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')].index, 0)), variables('primaryRegion'), if(and(equals(variables('vmList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')].type, 'jmp'), equals(variables('vmList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')].index, 0)), variables('primaryRegion'), if(not(or(equals(variables('vmList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')].type, 'dc'), equals(variables('vmList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')].type, 'jmp'))), variables('regionKeys')[add(mod(variables('roundRobinVmIndexList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')], sub(parameters('regionCount'), 1)), 1)], if(less(variables('vmList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')].index, sub(parameters('regionCount'), 1)), variables('regionKeys')[add(mod(variables('roundRobinVmIndexList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')], sub(parameters('regionCount'), 1)), 1)], variables('regionKeys')[mod(variables('roundRobinVmIndexList')[copyIndex('vmPlacements')], parameters('regionCount'))])))))]

variables.orderedDcRegions: [concat(if(contains(variables('dcRegions'), variables('primaryRegion')), createArray(variables('primaryRegion')), createArray()), filter(variables('dcRegions'), lambda('r', not(equals(lambdaVariables('r'), variables('primaryRegion'))))))]

variables.msg1: [if(variables('invalidMinimums'), 'At least 1 DC and 1 Jumpbox are required.', '')]
variables.msg3: [if(variables('invalidPrimaryPinning'), 'Primary pinning failed: dc01 and jmp01 must be placed in the primary region.', '')]
variables.msg4: [if(variables('hasNonControlInHub'), 'One or more non-control VMs were placed in the hub region.', '')]
variables.msg5: [if(variables('missingRegionIndex'), 'One or more regions are missing in regionIndexMap.', '')]
variables.msg6: [if(variables('hasInvalidSubnetIndex'), 'Subnet index map must include dc, jumpbox, server, and client.', '')]
variables.msg7: [if(variables('hasRegionOverflow'), 'One or more regions exceed the maximum allowed VMs per region.', '')]
variables.msg8: [if(variables('invalidCapacity'), 'Too many VMs for the allowed capacity per region.', '')]
variables.msg9: [if(variables('invalidIndexSequence'), 'Region index map must have continuous values starting at 1.', '')]
variables.msg10: [if(parameters('hasTooManyDcs'), 'Too many DCs for the available regions.', '')]
variables.validationMessage: [if(not(equals(variables('msg1'), '')), variables('msg1'), if(not(equals(variables('msg2'), '')), variables('msg2'), if(not(equals(variables('msg3'), '')), variables('msg3'), if(not(equals(variables('msg4'), '')), variables('msg4'), if(not(equals(variables('msg5'), '')), variables('msg5'), if(not(equals(variables('msg6'), '')), variables('msg6'), if(not(equals(variables('msg7'), '')), variables('msg7'), if(not(equals(variables('msg8'), '')), variables('msg8'), if(not(equals(variables('msg9'), '')), variables('msg9'), if(not(equals(variables('msg10'), '')), variables('msg10'), ''))))))))))]

resources.name: [format('rt-{0}', variables('regionKeys')[copyIndex()])]

serverSubnetId.value: [reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}-rg-{1}', parameters('prefix'), variables('regionKeys')[copyIndex()])), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('vnet-{0}', variables('regionKeys')[copyIndex()])), '2025-04-01').outputs.subnets.value.server.id]

clientSubnetId.value: [reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}-rg-{1}', parameters('prefix'), variables('regionKeys')[copyIndex()])), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('vnet-{0}', variables('regionKeys')[copyIndex()])), '2025-04-01').outputs.subnets.value.client.id]

clientNsgId.value: [reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}-rg-{1}', parameters('prefix'), variables('regionKeys')[copyIndex()])), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('vnet-{0}', variables('regionKeys')[copyIndex()])), '2025-04-01').outputs.nsgs.value.client]

nextHopIp.value: [reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}-rg-{1}', parameters('prefix'), variables('hubRegion'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('firewall-{0}', variables('hubRegion'))), '2025-04-01').outputs.firewallPrivateIp.value]

dependsOn: [extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}-rg-{1}', parameters('prefix'), variables('hubRegion'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', format('firewall-{0}', variables('hubRegion')))]
